Core Elements of Antibiotic Stewardship for Nursing Homes 
Sept. 10, 2025 
At a glance 
CDC recommends that all long-term care facilities and nursing homes take steps to improve antibiotic prescribing practices and reduce inappropriate use. 
The Core Elements of Antibiotic Stewardship for Nursing Home
